text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, you wanna play RDLI again?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that one day we hung out, Narita<n>Taishin and
I have been battling each<n>other on RDLI regularly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting bored beating you every<n>time. It's
gotten to the point where I<n>think I'm kind of done
with this game<n>entirely...
choice_data_list: Fine, this'll be our last match, but I'm not losing!

text_block_list.text: You seem pretty sure of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. Let's finish this for good,<n>then.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's a reason I'm so confident,<n>and that's
because I met up with one<n>of her close friends for
advice on how<n>to win. That person was...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The way to beat Taishin is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just trying really, really hard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep! The key to anything is having the<n>right
mindset!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin's not the most open person<n>in the world,
which can be tough...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But she's not a bad person either! So<n>all you gotta
do is be persistent!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But wow, I'm so glad Taishin has<n>you as her
trainer! You really care<n>about her so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! I'm sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know this might be a tall ask, but<n>please take
good care of her!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Please, oh please, oh pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, we really<n>didn't talk much
about the game<n>itself. What's important is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, you ready? Let's start.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And the final result of our fierce<n>match is...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: YOU LOSE.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, you still suck.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My final game against Narita Taishin<n>is a
one-sided stomp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It looked like you had some kind of<n>strategy, but
you still lost... What were<n>you doing anyway?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
The secret to victory is willpower, so I just tried
really hard to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft. The heck are you on about? You<n>sound just
like Ticket—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: —I mean...
choice_data_list: Was that a chuckle I heard from you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: N-no! You heard wrong!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I expect her to storm off after her<n>mood worsens,
but instead, she<n>stands there and stares at me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you just standing there for?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It hits me that she's waiting for me<n>so we can
leave together. I've never<n>felt closer to Narita
Taishin than I do in<n>that moment.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you play games with Taishin—it all<n>makes
sense now. I've been<n>wondering why she's
been in such a<n>good...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oops, don't mind me. Sorry, I'd love<n>to give you
advice on how to beat her,<n>but gaming is
unfortunately outside<n>my area of expertise.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I can give you information<n>on Taishin
herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. There's nothing stopping you<n>from
employing some tricks outside<n>the game in order
to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Still, it won't be as easy as I make it<n>out to be.
This is between you and<n>me, but Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After stubbornly refusing to lose<n>multiple battles,
we're thrown into<n>sudden death. I can finally put
Biwa<n>Hayahide's tip to use.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grr, you just won't die, will you?<n>Give up already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide told me that Narita<n>Taishin clicks
her tongue when she's<n>impatient, and that's
when I should<n>strike if I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Hey! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: YOU WIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...No way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You won? Against me?! Did Iseriously just lose to a low-ranknoob like you?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She mumbles to herself in disbelief,<n>apparently
very shocked by her loss.
choice_data_list: Thanks for playing with me one last time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? Oh, right. I did<n>say that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That was a fluke. You only won<n>because I messed
up, and I'm not<n>gonna let things end like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I challenge you to a rematch!
choice_data_list: But you said that was the last time...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You want to entertain me, right? Then<n>keep gaming
with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! That's not what I said! Come on,<n>let's play
already!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This isn't exactly how I thought<n>things would go,
but I feel a little<n>closer to Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna let the score end this<n>way! No more
holding back—you're<n>dead!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: At least, I think we're closer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! So you're trying to entertain<n>her with
some fun playtime?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What a nice trainer you are! Oh,<n>yes-you-are!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, that Taishin can be just alittle—and I do mean just a tinybit—difficult to handle, but that's what makes her so charming!
choice_data_list:
You're right, but that's not what I wanted to talk
abo—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Where are my manners? You<n>wait right here,
and I'll go make us<n>some tea.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I hardly ever get the chance to talk to<n>someone
else about little Taishin after<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No need to be polite! You just sit back<n>and relax.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There, there! You're such a nice<n>trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I didn't learn<n>anything at
all from Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why are you sweating bullets out of<n>nowhere?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. Let's just start.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swish! Slash, slash! Pow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is on fire, and I can't<n>think of any
countermeasures to<n>stave her off. I'm fighting for
my life!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just when I think I'm doomed to lose,<n>the screen
displays a message.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dang it. Time's up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Time runs out, and we end in a draw.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Usually, she's all about going on the<n>offensive, but
this time, she mostly<n>observed and hardly
attacked.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just wanted to see what you were<n>up to.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You seemed so sure of yourself, so I<n>wanted to
see what kind of strategy<n>you had up your
sleeves.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The fact that she purposefully held<n>back to give
me a chance to win<n>really touches me. Without
realizing, I<n>suddenly blurt out...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nice? Kid? Are you joking?
choice_data_list:
(Oh no, Super Creek's way of talking rubbed off
on me!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I brace myself for the barrage of<n>angry insults
headed my way... but<n>they never come.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't treat me like a child. Sheesh.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her words are harsh, but she<n>doesn't seem
angry. Normally, she<n>hates being treated like a
kid...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, if you didn't get to do your<n>strategy, we can
play again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: For some reason, she's a lot nicer<n>than normal.
